title: Mutation XSS via namespace confusion - DOMPurify < 2.0.17 bypass - research.securitum.com
description: In this blogpost I’ll explain my recent bypass in DOMPurify – the popular HTML sanitizer library. In a nutshell, DOMPurify’s job is to take an untrusted HTML snippet, supposedly coming from an end-user, and remove all elements and attributes that can lead to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This is the bypass: Believe me that there’s not ...
